Backend Engineer for Product Platform

ABOUT THE ROLE
We are building a product platform that powers internal workflows, job tracking, and AI-assisted recommendations for hiring teams.

You will design and ship backend APIs, improve the reliability of matching workflows, and work closely with product and frontend engineers.

RESPONSIBILITIES
- Build and maintain FastAPI services that expose stable JSON APIs.
- Design PostgreSQL queries and data models for search, matching, and reporting.
- Improve observability with metrics, structured logs, and tracing.
- Work with Docker-based local development and deployment workflows.
- Partner with frontend engineers to keep API payloads easy to render.

REQUIREMENTS
- Strong Python and FastAPI experience.
- Solid PostgreSQL or SQL background.
- Experience with Docker and API debugging.
- Familiarity with metrics, logging, and production incident response.
- Ability to explain tradeoffs and write clear technical documentation.

PREFERRED
- AWS, Kubernetes, or other cloud deployment experience.
- Background with AI-powered products, search, or ranking systems.
- Experience improving developer productivity or internal tools.
